title: Say hello to my little friend
description: Say hello to my little friend
prompt_text: A slightly overcast outdoor scene by a rustic wooden shed with horizontal planks. The ground is a mix of green grass and muddy patches. A small, two-panel wooden door with rusty metal hinges and a rope handle is set into the shed's wall near the ground. In the background, a rural landscape with distant trees, a fence, and what appears to be another building is visible under a light gray sky. The main character is a white domestic duck with an orange beak and webbed feet, comically augmented with muscular, flesh-toned human-like arms attached to its sides.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A slightly overcast outdoor scene by a rustic wooden shed with horizontal planks. The ground is a mix of green grass and muddy patches. A small, two-panel wooden door with rusty metal hinges and a rope handle is set into the shed's wall near the ground. In the background, a rural landscape with distant trees, a fence, and what appears to be another building is visible under a light gray sky. The main character is a white domestic duck with an orange beak and webbed feet, comically augmented with muscular, flesh-toned human-like arms attached to its sides.

cinematography.cameraShot: Starts as a medium, static shot of the shed door, then transitions to a handheld, eye-level tracking shot, following the duck as it emerges and moves. The shot is dynamic, adjusting to keep the duck centered.

actions: A person's hand reaches down towards a small wooden door on the side of a shed.
The hand grasps a rope handle attached to the right side of the small door.
The hand pulls the rope handle, causing the two small wooden doors to swing open.
A white duck, adorned with muscular, flesh-toned human-like arms, waddles out from the shed's opening.
The duck steps onto the grassy, muddy ground and immediately begins to raise and flex its artificial muscular arms.
The duck performs a series of exaggerated flexing poses, turning its body and head while making quacking sounds.
The duck continues to waddle slightly forward, showcasing its powerful-looking arms.
The duck lowers its head briefly, then raises it again, still moving its muscular arms as if to emphasize its strength.
dialogue: Sound of a duck honking/quacking loudly.
Sound of excited human vocalizations, including an 'Oh!'
